title: WhatsApp notification on new order placement

requirements.summary: Trigger WhatsApp notification to +919137202881 with full order details immediately after successful order placement
acceptanceCriteria: After a customer successfully places an order, a new browser tab opens with a pre-filled WhatsApp message to +919137202881.
The WhatsApp message includes the Order ID.
The WhatsApp message includes the buyer's full name, country, phone number, and address.
The WhatsApp message includes a list of all ordered items with product name and quantity for each item.
The WhatsApp message includes the order total formatted with the Euro (€) symbol.
The WhatsApp message includes the order timestamp.
Opening the WhatsApp notification tab does not block the customer from being redirected to the Order Confirmation page.
The notification is triggered inside the onSuccess callback of the placeOrder mutation in Cart.tsx (or useQueries.ts), after the order is confirmed.

file_operations.description: Create a utility function buildWhatsAppNotificationURL that accepts order details (orderId, customerInfo, items array with product names and quantities, total, timestamp) and constructs a properly URL-encoded WhatsApp deep-link (https://wa.me/919137202881?text=...) containing Order ID, buyer's full name, country, phone number, address, item list, order total in €, and timestamp. Also create a function sendWhatsAppNotification that calls buildWhatsAppNotificationURL and opens the URL in a new tab using window.open with noopener/noreferrer for security.

In the usePlaceOrder mutation's onSuccess callback, immediately after the order is successfully placed and before navigation to the order confirmation page, call sendWhatsAppNotification with the order details (orderId from the mutation result, customer info from the form, cart items with product names and quantities fetched from context, total from cart context, and current timestamp). Ensure the WhatsApp notification call does not block or delay the existing navigate() call to the order confirmation page. Import the sendWhatsAppNotification function from frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts and access cart items and total from the CartContext to build the notification payload.
